text_raw: You know where you are, ey?
text_clean: You know where you are, ey?

text_raw: Hmm... Looks like you're allowed in.
text_clean: Hmm... Looks like you're allowed in.

text_raw: You deaf? Come back when you're cleared.
text_clean: You deaf? Come back when you're cleared.

text_raw: You know, not just anyone can get in here!
text_clean: You know, not just anyone can get in here!

text_raw: Try that again and see what happens.
text_clean: Try that again and see what happens.

text_raw: All kinds of riffraff turning up lately.
text_clean: All kinds of riffraff turning up lately.

text_raw: You can't just barge in here.
text_clean: You can't just barge in here.

text_raw: Hmm... Looks like you're allowed in.
text_clean: Hmm... Looks like you're allowed in.

text_raw: You deaf? Come back when you're cleared.
text_clean: You deaf? Come back when you're cleared.

text_raw: You know, not just anyone can get in here!
text_clean: You know, not just anyone can get in here!

text_raw: Wait, try that again, see what happens.
text_clean: Wait, try that again, see what happens.

text_raw: That one's a bloody mountain of muscle.
text_clean: That one's a bloody mountain of muscle.

text_raw: Come on let's finish these drinks! I need to get home.
text_clean: Come on let's finish these drinks! I need to get home.

text_raw: Wish they'd just handed out coin instead.
text_clean: Wish they'd just handed out coin instead.

text_raw: There he goes again. Someone ought to hold him to that!
text_clean: There he goes again. Someone ought to hold him to that!

text_raw: D'you see the fireworks at the circus last night?
text_clean: D'you see the fireworks at the circus last night?

text_raw: It was brilliant! Must have cost a bloody fortune.
text_clean: It was brilliant! Must have cost a bloody fortune.

text_raw: Why such a commotion in my hall?
text_clean: Why such a commotion in my hall?

text_raw: Seeing as you're here, you must be one of the illustrious {StaticInfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Graymane#Greymanes}.
text_clean: Seeing as you're here, you must be one of the illustrious {StaticInfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Graymane#Greymanes}.

text_raw: I've heard how you chased a bear all the way to my fair city.
text_clean: I've heard how you chased a bear all the way to my fair city.

text_raw: Come. I suspect our purposes may align.
text_clean: Come. I suspect our purposes may align.

text_raw: I shall speak with him, privately.
text_clean: I shall speak with him, privately.

text_raw: Now, why all the effort to elude my guards and enter my estate?
text_clean: Now, why all the effort to elude my guards and enter my estate?

text_raw: Is that so? You could have tried the front gate.
text_clean: Is that so? You could have tried the front gate.

text_raw: Daughter of the late lord, Robert Azerian.
text_clean: Daughter of the late lord, Robert Azerian.

text_raw: But I am afraid I do not know the whereabouts of your nemesis.
text_clean: But I am afraid I do not know the whereabouts of your nemesis.

text_raw: Fortunately, I do know those who might.
text_clean: Fortunately, I do know those who might.

text_raw: Isn't it said the enemy of my enemy is my friend?
text_clean: Isn't it said the enemy of my enemy is my friend?

text_raw: I suspect we could become very good friends.
text_clean: I suspect we could become very good friends.

text_raw: I have been searching for my sister, Beatrice,
text_clean: I have been searching for my sister, Beatrice,

text_raw: the rightful heir to my title and estate.
text_clean: the rightful heir to my title and estate.

text_raw: Her disappearance, and the tragedy that befell your people...
text_clean: Her disappearance, and the tragedy that befell your people...

text_raw: I believe the one who holds true power over this land is behind it all.
text_clean: I believe the one who holds true power over this land is behind it all.

text_raw: No. One who sits higher still.
text_clean: No. One who sits higher still.

text_raw: The man who purged the king's loyalists and seized the throne.
text_clean: The man who purged the king's loyalists and seized the throne.

text_raw: I believe my sister was conducting an investigation into his affairs.
text_clean: I believe my sister was conducting an investigation into his affairs.

text_raw: But I've heard nothing from her since that... bloody coronation.
text_clean: But I've heard nothing from her since that... bloody coronation.

text_raw:
These days, I don't step foot beyond these walls.
Out there, a single misstep could spell my end.
text_clean:
These days, I don't step foot beyond these walls.
Out there, a single misstep could spell my end.

text_raw: Any nobles who oppose Caliburn fear befalling the same fate.
text_clean: Any nobles who oppose Caliburn fear befalling the same fate.

text_raw: Only Countess Marshell and Count Byron seem unconcerned.
text_clean: Only Countess Marshell and Count Byron seem unconcerned.

text_raw: They surely hold the answers we seek.
text_clean: They surely hold the answers we seek.

text_raw: Remember, while our purposes differ, our goal is the same.
text_clean: Remember, while our purposes differ, our goal is the same.

text_raw: An intruder, my lady. We were about to apprehend him.
text_clean: An intruder, my lady. We were about to apprehend him.

text_raw: My lady, at least allow us to stand guard...
text_clean: My lady, at least allow us to stand guard...

text_raw: Knave! How did you make it this far?!
text_clean: Knave! How did you make it this far?!

text_raw: I meant no trouble. I came seeking information.
text_clean: I meant no trouble. I came seeking information.

text_raw: And you want me to see what they know.
text_clean: And you want me to see what they know.

text_raw: Are you sure wasn't just fireworks, eh?
text_clean: Are you sure wasn't just fireworks, eh?

text_raw: Have you been at the ale again?
text_clean: Have you been at the ale again?

text_raw: Bah, whatever. Why are you so worked up over some noise?
text_clean: Bah, whatever. Why are you so worked up over some noise?

text_raw: I'm certain, it sounded far too strange.
text_clean: I'm certain, it sounded far too strange.

text_raw: There was a loud bang, and then flames shot up!
text_clean: There was a loud bang, and then flames shot up!

text_raw: You don't believe me do you?
text_clean: You don't believe me do you?

text_raw: What?! When have I ever lied to you?!
text_clean: What?! When have I ever lied to you?!

text_raw: Well, you've got to admit we've all heard a share of your lies before, haven't we?
text_clean: Well, you've got to admit we've all heard a share of your lies before, haven't we?

text_raw: You're so annoying! I really did hear something.
text_clean: You're so annoying! I really did hear something.

text_raw: Trust me! Don't you believe your own sister?
text_clean: Trust me! Don't you believe your own sister?

text_raw: I'm telling the truth! I promise. Boom! It was really loud like that!
text_clean: I'm telling the truth! I promise. Boom! It was really loud like that!

text_raw: I know what I heard. It woke me straight up.
text_clean: I know what I heard. It woke me straight up.

text_raw: How did no one else hear it...
text_clean: How did no one else hear it...

text_raw: No! It's what happened, you idiot.
text_clean: No! It's what happened, you idiot.

text_raw: I'm going home! Don't talk to me!
text_clean: I'm going home! Don't talk to me!

text_raw: Come on, who'd be at the circus at midnight? That's stupid! Is long past bed time!
text_clean: Come on, who'd be at the circus at midnight? That's stupid! Is long past bed time!

text_raw: Sounds to me like you're just after some attention, same as always!
text_clean: Sounds to me like you're just after some attention, same as always!

text_raw: Oi! You can't just leave me here!
text_clean: Oi! You can't just leave me here!

text_raw: I must deliver the news to the Greymane at once...
text_clean: I must deliver the news to the Greymane at once...

text_raw: I've a message for you, from Countess Marshell.
text_clean: I've a message for you, from Countess Marshell.

text_raw: My Lady has found someone with news on your companions.
text_clean: My Lady has found someone with news on your companions.

text_raw: Find Lord Keg at the circus grounds tonight. He'll be waiting for you.
text_clean: Find Lord Keg at the circus grounds tonight. He'll be waiting for you.

text_raw: He can tell you everything he knows.
text_clean: He can tell you everything he knows.

text_raw: All kinds of scum these days...
text_clean: All kinds of scum these days...

text_raw: Next time, it won't go this way.
text_clean: Next time, it won't go this way.

text_raw: Come any closer and you'll regret it.
text_clean: Come any closer and you'll regret it.

text_raw: Next time, it won't go this way.
text_clean: Next time, it won't go this way.

text_raw: Come any closer and you'll regret it.
text_clean: Come any closer and you'll regret it.

text_raw: You're not the first riffraff to cause us trouble.
text_clean: You're not the first riffraff to cause us trouble.

text_raw: There won't be a next time.
text_clean: There won't be a next time.

text_raw: We deserve a nice cold pint after this.
text_clean: We deserve a nice cold pint after this.

text_raw: Don't you dare show your face here again.
text_clean: Don't you dare show your face here again.

text_raw: Struggling against a mere whelp, how sinful.
text_clean: Struggling against a mere whelp, how sinful.

text_raw: Only a miserable death awaits the guilty!
text_clean: Only a miserable death awaits the guilty!

text_raw: I've got family to care for, please!
text_clean: I've got family to care for, please!

text_raw: You heard. Right then, I'll count to three.
text_clean: You heard. Right then, I'll count to three.

text_raw: Hm... I'll take care of him.
text_clean: Hm... I'll take care of him.

text_raw: Well, what brings you back here?
text_clean: Well, what brings you back here?

text_raw: What are you scared for? We're giving you a chance to live.
text_clean: What are you scared for? We're giving you a chance to live.

text_raw: Look at the little bastard crying!
text_clean: Look at the little bastard crying!
